name: pokefriends
description: Poke'friends — cartoon multiplayer Texas Hold'em (web + mobile)

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @texas-holdem/shared build && pnpm --filter server build && pnpm --filter client build
scripts.cap:sync: pnpm --filter client build && npx cap sync
scripts.cap:android: pnpm cap:sync && npx cap open android
scripts.cap:ios: pnpm cap:sync && npx cap open ios
